contents: {a=Person_Toast}Toast{a} has been practicing his powers of cursing things to get delayed. This was famously performed with {a=Person_Craig}Craig{a} and {a=Person_Tokxi}Tokxi's{a} SlimeVR fullbody tracking, where they took another 2 years to arrive.

{a=Peopla_DwayneJohnson}Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson{a} married a toaster at the underwater basket weaving class. Witnesses say that this started after they saw him with a {a=Person_Craig}Craig{a} body pillow. They were also spotted riding a purple rexouium whilst eating a chocolate cake. Everyone was shocked by this incident. One professional napper exclaimed "Holy fuck!". The weather at the time was just as peculiar, as it was suddenly raining wet flying dildos. A man wearing a jockstrap was also found at the scene expressing unsatisfying horny feelings at the complete absurdity of the situation.
As all of this was going down, a man claimed to have invented a device that translates purple rexouium noises into Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson speeches.

After awaiting for so long, {a=Person_Craig}Craig{a} finally did a date stream with {a=Person_Jessica}Jessica{a} - a data he matched up with on {a=App_HotSingleVRChatters}HotSingleVRChatters.com{a}. He took her to {a=Location_GreasySpaceChicken}Greasy Space Chicken{a}. Jessica ordered a moonshine and a {a=Product_DeepFriedPlacenta}deep-fried placenta{a}, whilst Craig ordered a moonshine and a deep-fried placenta. Unfortunately the waiter, {a=Person_Woopinator}Doughnut Man{a}, spilt the moonshine all over Craig. Craig also didn't get a deep-fried placenta and instead got fish heads. His friend, {a=Person_DoughnutMan}Freddy{a}, came in whilst he was cleaning himself in the restroom. Freddy let loose a couple secrets about Craig, such as his enjoyment of cosplaying. Freddy was simply checking up on Craig, as they know how nervous Craig gets around women (and that he scratches his butt a lot, when talking to them). After the food, they went back to Craig's place and done some cosplaying.

header: Tails and Delicious Dumb Dining announcement
contents: {a=Peopla_Poppet}Poppet{a} has announced the biggest collaboration in dining history. {a=Peopla_Craig}Craig{a}, {a=Peopla_Aheko}Aheko{a}, Poppet, {a=Peopla_Ritikl}Ritikl{a}, {a=Peopla_Thunderbird}Thunderbird{a}, and {a=Peopla_Toast}Toast{a} have come together to create {a=Location_TailsAndDeliciousDumbDining}"Tails and Delicious Dumb Dining"{a}. The menu combines everything that they have all ever released and adds a few extra items.

A group of penguins unexpectedly surrounded {a=Peopla_Craig}Craig{a}, at The White House. They requested to join him and be a part of civilized society. After Craig suggested they belong in a zoo, the penguins became feral and viciously attacked him. They then suddenly disappeared without a trace or witness.
{a=Peopla_Thunderbird}Thunderbird{a} managed to clear a minefield with their own face.
